Rust · WebAssembly · WebGL2

Petri Polis

A bioluminescent toy for watching complex patterns grow out of a few simple rules. Thousands of agents drop glowing trails, sense the glow ahead, and steer toward it — and with no central plan they weave themselves into living, branching networks. Two species compete over a shared, regrowing food field, so the world also breathes in boom/bust cycles.

▶ Play

Run the toy in your browser. Tune every rule live, spawn agents, and share a run by URL.

The guide

A book on the concepts and algorithms: the Physarum rule, the ecology, two-species coexistence, determinism.

API docs

Generated cargo doc for the petri-core and petri-wasm crates.
Source on GitHub · MIT licensed
